---
title: "08. 柔弱胜刚强"
subtitle: "The Strength of Softness and Yielding"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 8
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 7, 8, 13, 22, 36, 43, 52, 55, 61, 69, 73, 76, and 78 map yielding, softness, and non-rigidity onto No11 structure, fold stabilization, and information thresholds."
---

**Chapters:** 7, 8, 13, 22, 36, 43, 52, 55, 61, 69, 73, 76, 78  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `fold operator`, `rate-distortion`

{{< include articles/category_08_softness_yielding.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
